title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power Ready-Baited Rat Trap Kit - Reusable Rodent Trap For Indoor & Outdoor Use - Humane Pest Trap - Easy to Clean Plastic Rat Station With Prebaited Trap (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

PROFESSIONAL-GRADE RAT TRAP – This ready-baited rat trap station is a fast and reliable solution for tackling rodent problems indoors or outdoors. Ideal for use in homes, sheds or garages they ensure effective pest control

HIGHLY EFFECTIVE FORMULA – This rodent trap comes ready to use with a potent, poison-free prune-based attractant, making it safe and efficient. A pre-baited trap kit that delivers a reliable chemical-free humane solution for controlling pests effectively

SAFETY FIRST – Made from durable, weather-resistant plastic. The trap is enclosed in a lockable station to prevent children and pets from accidentally setting it off. Adaptable to a range of settings it ensures long-lasting performance in any condition

EASY SETUP – Activate the trap with one touch for simple handling. Dispose of pests with a click, avoiding direct contact. The trap can be re-baited with The Big Cheese Mouse and Rat Attractant (STV163 sold separately). Available in single and twin-packs

ULTRA POWER RODENT CONTROL - Our Ultra Power products from The Big Cheese will deliver effective results every time - just like the professionals use. As experts in rodent control for over 30 years, you can trust us to take care of your pest problems
